title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Wipro Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Wipro Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Wipro Capital India are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wipro Capital India:
Wipro Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
